grossAmount.description: Total gross payment amount from subscription and usage sales

upcomingTotal.description: Total upcoming amount (to be paid by end of period)

netAmount.description: Total net payout amount (actual amount received)

dueTotal.description: Total due amount (billed but not yet collected)

fees.description: Total fees for the period (negative values)

taxes.description: Total tax amounts for the period (negative values)

credits.description: Total credit amounts for the period (negative values)

refunds.description: Total refund amounts for the period (negative values)

timeSeries.description:
Time series data by payout periods (only present if interval=payout).
Each entry represents a complete payout period that falls entirely within the requested date range.

periodStart.description: Start of this complete payout period

periodEnd.description: End of this complete payout period

grossAmount.description: Gross payment amount from subscription and usage sales for this period

taxes.description: Tax amounts for this period (negative values)

credits.description: Credit amounts for this period (negative values)

refunds.description: Refund amounts for this period (negative values)

netAmount.description: Net payout amount (actual amount received) for this period

timeSeriesInterval.description: Interval used for time series (only present if interval=payout)
